prompts.title: UI_GenerateReactComponent
prompts.description: Scaffold a typed React functional component
prompts.prompt:
Generate a React functional component in TypeScript named {{ComponentName}}.
Accept props: {{propsList}}.
Include:
- A typed Props interface
- Default export
- Basic JSX structure
- CSS module import stub
- JSDoc comment describing the component

prompts.title: BE_GenerateRESTController
prompts.description: Scaffold a Spring Boot REST controller

prompts.title: Shared_ExplainCode
prompts.description: Plain English explanation of selected code
prompts.prompt:
Explain the selected code in plain English:
1. Purpose — what it does at a high level
2. How it works — step-by-step walkthrough
3. Key concepts — patterns or framework features used
4. Gotchas — potential pitfalls or side effects
